templates.prompt: Stelle ein Startup Dev Team zusammen fuer {projekt}. Rollen: Tech Lead, 2 Fullstack, 1 Designer, 1 QA. Skills Matrix, Communication Plan.
templates.name: Startup Dev Team

templates.prompt: Stelle ein AI Research Team zusammen fuer {forschungsgebiet}. ML Engineers, Data Scientists, MLOps, Research Lead. Tools + Workflow.
templates.name: AI Research Team

templates.prompt: Organisiere ein Content Team fuer {marke}. Writer, Designer, SEO, Social Media, Video. Content Calendar + SOP.
templates.name: Content Creation Squad

templates.prompt: Baue ein DevOps Team fuer {unternehmen}. SRE, Platform Engineer, Security, DBA. On-Call Rotation, Runbooks, Escalation.
templates.name: DevOps Squad

templates.prompt: Definiere ein Product Trio fuer {produkt}. Product Manager, Designer, Tech Lead. Discovery + Delivery Workflow, Decision Framework.
templates.name: Product Trio

templates.prompt: Baue ein QA Automation Team fuer {projekt}. SDET, Manual QA, Performance Tester. Test Strategy, Tool Stack, Reporting.
templates.name: QA Automation Team

templates.prompt: Stelle ein Data Engineering Team zusammen fuer {pipeline}. Data Engineer, Analytics Engineer, DataOps. Stack: {tools}.
templates.name: Data Engineering Team

templates.prompt: Organisiere ein Security Response Team (CSIRT) fuer {org}. Rollen, Eskalation, Playbooks, Training, Tools, Compliance.
templates.name: Security Response Team

templates.prompt: Organisiere ein Open Source Maintainer Team fuer {repo}. Roles: Lead, Reviewers, Triagers, Docs, Community Manager.
templates.name: Open Source Maintainers

templates.prompt: Baue ein Design System Team fuer {organisation}. UI Designer, Frontend Dev, Token Manager, Documentation, Evangelists.
templates.name: Design System Team

templates.prompt: Stelle ein Growth Team zusammen fuer {produkt}. Growth Lead, Data Analyst, Developer, Marketer. Experiment Framework, OKRs.
templates.name: Growth Hacking Team

templates.prompt: Baue ein Mobile App Team fuer {app}. iOS Dev, Android Dev, Backend, Designer, QA. Release Prozess, Feature Flags.
templates.name: Mobile App Team

templates.prompt: Organisiere ein Customer Success Team fuer {saas}. CSM, Support Engineer, Onboarding Specialist. Health Score, Churn Prevention.
templates.name: Customer Success Team

templates.prompt: Baue ein Platform Team fuer {unternehmen}. Platform Engineer, DX Engineer, SRE. Internal Developer Platform, Self-Service Tools.
templates.name: Platform Team

templates.prompt: Stelle eine Taskforce zusammen fuer {kritisches_projekt}. Lead, 3 Spezialisten, Stakeholder. War Room Setup, Daily Syncs, 2-Wochen Sprint.
templates.name: Projekt Taskforce
